\providecommand{\Pageref}[1]{\hfill p.\pageref{#1}}
 [**Corollary 1**](#Corollary-1)\Pageref{Corollary-1}

 [**Definition 2**](#Definition-2)\Pageref{Definition-2}

 [**Theorem 3**](#hartman-grobman): Hartman-Grobman\Pageref{hartman-grobman}

 [**Theorem 1**](#Theorem-1)\Pageref{Theorem-1}

 [**Corollary 2**](#Corollary-2)\Pageref{Corollary-2}

 [**Corollary 3**](#Corollary-3)\Pageref{Corollary-3}

 [**Definition 4**](#Definition-4)\Pageref{Definition-4}

 [**Theorem 5**](#Theorem-5)\Pageref{Theorem-5}

 [**Definition 6**](#Definition-6)\Pageref{Definition-6}

 [**Theorem 1**](#Theorem-1)\Pageref{Theorem-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Theorem 3**](#Theorem-3)\Pageref{Theorem-3}

 [**Theorem 4**](#Theorem-4)\Pageref{Theorem-4}

 [**Corollary 5**](#Corollary-5)\Pageref{Corollary-5}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}
